caption: A man with a shaved head, beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio against a dark gray acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a red and black logo that reads "Stay Executing". A large silver condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Initially, he looks slightly to the left with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his gaze and begins to speak, his mouth opening. In the third frame, he gestures with his right hand, which appears blurred due to movement. In the final frame, he continues speaking while looking toward the side. The camera remains static throughout the sequence, capturing his upper body and the professional recording equipment.
